exort.message.debug_load_summary: Modelo del benchmark: jugadores %1$s, chunks %2$s, almacenamientos/chunk %3$s, buses/chunk %4$s, monitores/chunk %5$s, ops/tick estimadas %6$s (global %7$s, chunk %8$s), db/tick %9$s, actualizaciones de monitor %10$s/t%11$s, wire %12$s/%13$s miss %14$s%% cover %15$s%%, ventana medida %16$ss tras la preparación (min warmup %17$ss), jitter %18$s%%, guard players %19$s, guard entities %20$s/%21$s, guard churn %22$s/tick, world lanes %23$s, world ops/tick %24$s, world blocks %25$s, water-test wire length %26$s, water sources %27$s, water extra chunks %28$s
